cards.title: [FEATURE] Comment Auto-Sort Implementation
cards.description:
Implement automatic comment sorting by 'Most Respected' for Coral comment system

**User Story:**
As a Tagesspiegel reader, I want comments to auto-sort by 'Beliebteste zuerst' so I see the most valuable comments first.

**Technical Approach:**
- Option 1: Contact Tagesspiegel to enable talk-plugin-sort-most-respected as default (RECOMMENDED)
- Option 2: User guidance with toast notification (FALLBACK)
- Option 3: Experiment with postMessage API (EXPERIMENTAL)

**Resources:**
- Spec: docs/specs/comment-sort-feature.spec.md
- Analysis: docs/coral-research-summary.md
- Technical notes: docs/comment-sorting-analysis.md

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Comments auto-sort when feature enabled
- [ ] Works on Firefox and Chrome
- [ ] Setting persists across sessions
- [ ] No console errors introduced

cards.title: [ONBOARDING] First-Run Experience
cards.description:
Add onboarding tour for first-time users

**Problem:**
User testing found that first-time users don't understand how the extension works without reading docs.

**Solution:**
Show 3-screen modal on first popup open:
1. 'Willkommen! Diese Extension blendet Sektionen auf tagesspiegel.de aus.'
2. 'So geht's: Besuche eine Artikel-Seite → Sektionen erscheinen im Filter-Tab.'
3. 'Tipp: Badge zeigt dir, wie viele Sektionen aktuell ausgeblendet sind.'

**Source:** User Testing Report (docs/user-test-results.md)
**Severity:** HIGH (affects all new users)

cards.title: [I18N] Translate Info Tab to German
cards.description:
Info tab contains English text in German extension:

**Current:**
'Enjoying this extension? Instead of sending me your Bitcoins, just buy me a coffee...'

**Should be:**
'Gefällt Ihnen diese Extension? Statt Bitcoins zu senden, kaufen Sie mir lieber einen Kaffee...'

**Source:** User Testing Report
**Severity:** MEDIUM (trust signal)

cards.title: [A11Y] Add aria-labels to Toggle Switches
cards.description:
Toggle switches in Settings tab lack screen reader labels

**Issue:**
WCAG 2.1 AA violation (4.1.2 Name, Role, Value)

**Fix:**
Add aria-label to all toggle inputs:
- 'Extension aktivieren'
- 'Kommentare nach Beliebtheit sortieren'
- 'Dark Mode' (if exists)

**Source:** User Testing Report
**Severity:** HIGH (accessibility)

cards.title: [UX] Add Tooltips to Refresh Button
cards.description:
Refresh button in Filter tab has no explanation

**Fix:**
Add tooltip: 'Sektionen neu erkennen — nützlich nach Seiten-Navigation ohne Reload'

**Alternative:**
Only show button when refresh is actually needed (detect SPA navigation)

**Source:** User Testing Report
**Severity:** MEDIUM

cards.title: [FEATURE] Settings Export/Import
cards.description:
Allow users to export/import their settings as JSON

**User Story:**
As a user switching browsers, I need to export my settings so I don't lose my configuration.

**Implementation:**
- Add 'Settings exportieren' button in Info tab
- Download JSON file with all settings
- Add 'Settings importieren' button to restore

**Source:** User Testing Report
**Severity:** LOW (data portability)

cards.title: Release v1.1.0 - Comment Sort Guidance + Settings Tab
cards.description:
**Release Date:** 2026-03-13

**Features Added:**
- Settings Tab: New 'Einstellungen' tab in popup
- Global Disable Switch: Toggle extension on/off
- Comment Sort Guidance: Toast notification for sorting comments
- Stats Tracking Fix: Hidden sections counted correctly

**Changelog Entry:**
## [1.1.0] - 2026-03-13

### Fixed
- Stats Tracking: Fixed issue where hidden sections weren't being counted properly

### Added
- Settings Tab: New 'Einstellungen' tab for extension configuration
- Global Disable Switch: Toggle entire extension on/off
- Extension Status Persistence: Settings synchronized via browser.storage.sync
- Comment Sort Guidance: User guidance for sorting by 'Am meisten respektiert'

### Changed
- Badge Behavior: Badge counter only shows when extension is enabled
- Content Script: Respects extensionEnabled setting

cards.title: Release v1.0.2 - Mozilla Submission
cards.description:
**Release Date:** 2026-03-14

**Purpose:**
Official release submitted to Mozilla Add-ons (AMO)

**Changelog Entry:**
## [1.0.2] - 2026-03-14

### Changed
- Mozilla Submission: Official release submitted to Mozilla Add-ons
- Version Bump: Prepared for AMO distribution

cards.title: Release v1.0.1 - Badge Counter + Sync Support
cards.description:
**Release Date:** 2026-03-01

**Major Features:**
- Icon Badge Counter showing hidden sections
- Firefox Sync support
- Four-Tab Navigation redesign
- Interactive Statistics

**Changelog Entry:**
## [1.0.1] - 2026-03-01

### Added
- Icon Badge Counter: Real-time badge showing hidden sections count
- Firefox Sync Support: Settings synchronized across devices
- Four-Tab Navigation: Filter, Aktiv, Stats, and Info tabs
- Dynamic Statistics: Ranking of most frequently hidden sections
- Branded Info Tab: Donation buttons, GitHub link, Disclaimer
- Auto Theming: Dark/Light mode adaptation
- Background Script: Service worker for badge management

### Changed
- Popup UI Cleanup: Simplified labels, minimalist aesthetic
- Stats Management: Migrated to sectionStats object

### Fixed
- Improved section detection logic
- Enhanced stability for sync storage

cards.title: Release v1.0.0 - Initial Release
cards.description:
**Release Date:** 2026-02-25

**Initial Features:**
- Section hiding functionality
- Basic statistics tracking
- Android nightly build support

**Changelog Entry:**
## [1.0.0] - 2026-02-25

### Added
- Initial release of Tagesspiegel Filter extension
- Section hiding functionality for Tagesspiegel website
- Basic statistics tracking for hidden sections
- Android nightly build support

cards.title: Spec: Comment Sort Feature
cards.description:
**File:** docs/specs/comment-sort-feature.spec.md

**Feature ID:** F-002
**Status:** Approved for Implementation

**Summary:**
Auto-sort comments by 'beliebteste zuerst' using Coral comment system guidance

**Key Constraints:**
- Cross-origin iframe prevents direct DOM manipulation
- No URL parameters for sorting
- No postMessage API documented

**Solution:**
User guidance with toast notification as interim solution while contacting Tagesspiegel

**Full spec available in docs/specs/comment-sort-feature.spec.md

cards.title: Ticket: Auto-Sort Comments (Firefox)
cards.description:
**File:** docs/tickets/auto-sort-comments-firefox.md

**Priority:** High
**Phase:** Firefox first, Chrome follow-up

**User Story:**
As a Tagesspiegel reader using Firefox, I want comments to auto-sort by 'Beliebteste zuerst' so I see popular comments first.

**Scope:**
- Firefox extension only (Chrome later)
- tagesspiegel.de article pages with Coral comments
- Setting toggle in extension settings

**Technical Notes:**
- Comments in cross-origin iframe
- Sort control inside iframe
- postMessage or URL parameter injection needed

**Full ticket in docs/tickets/auto-sort-comments-firefox.md

cards.title: Analysis: Comment Sorting Technical Research
cards.description:
**File:** docs/comment-sorting-analysis.md

**Key Findings:**
- Coral uses cross-origin iframe from coral.tagesspiegel.de
- Cannot directly manipulate iframe DOM
- Possible solutions: URL parameters, postMessage, server-side config

**Recommended Approach:**
1. Primary: Contact Tagesspiegel to enable talk-plugin-sort-most-respected
2. Secondary: User guidance with toast
3. Tertiary: Experiment with postMessage

**HTML Structure:**
- Iframe src includes asset_id parameter
- Sort button inside iframe
- Container: #coral_talk_stream

**Full analysis in docs/comment-sorting-analysis.md

cards.title: Research: Coral Comment System
cards.description:
**File:** docs/coral-research-summary.md

**Coral Plugins Available:**
- talk-plugin-viewing-options (required for sort dropdown)
- talk-plugin-sort-most-respected (DEFAULT - recommended)
- talk-plugin-sort-most-liked
- talk-plugin-sort-most-loved
- talk-plugin-sort-most-replied
- talk-plugin-sort-newest
- talk-plugin-sort-oldest
- talk-plugin-remember-sort

**Why 'Most Respected':**
- Coral's default reaction (instead of 'Like')
- Encourages thoughtful engagement
- German UI: 'Am meisten respektiert'

**Action Required:**
Contact Tagesspiegel admins to enable talk-plugin-sort-most-respected as default

**Full research in docs/coral-research-summary.md

cards.title: User Testing Report
cards.description:
**File:** docs/user-test-results.md

**Persona:** First-Time User (Sam, 24)
**Test Date:** 2026-03-28

**Critical Findings:**
1. [BROKEN-MENTAL-MODEL] Comment sort promises auto, delivers only toast
2. [ONBOARDING-GAP] No first-run explanation

**High Findings:**
3. [MISSING-FEEDBACK] Refresh button without context
4. [TRUST-SIGNAL] English text in German extension
5. [ACCESSIBILITY] Toggle switches lack aria-labels

**Medium Findings:**
6. [UX-FRICTION] Stats tab header unclear
7. [MISSING-FEEDBACK] Badge counter context unclear
8. [ASSUMPTION-VIOLATION] Users don't know 'Coral'

**Full report in docs/user-test-results.md
